FIELD.NAME: viewname
FIELD.COMMENT: DB view name (without prefix) when published

FIELD.NAME: columnsmeta
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON cache of introspected column types

FIELD.NAME: chartmeta
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON chart config: type, xcol, ycol, rowlimit

FIELD.NAME: groupmeta
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON control-break grouping config: breakcol, headercols, detailcols, rowlimit

FIELD.NAME: audiencemeta
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON audience choice: {type, roles?, cohorts?, users?}. NULL means auto.

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course this query is bound to; 0 means site-wide.

FIELD.NAME: visible
FIELD.COMMENT: Hidden queries are excluded from the per-course list.

FIELD.NAME: useridcolumn
FIELD.COMMENT: Output column matched against the viewing user's id; NULL = no per-user filter.

FIELD.NAME: coursecolumn
FIELD.COMMENT: Output column holding a course id; when set, rows are limited to courses the viewer teaches. NULL = no teacher-course filter.

FIELD.NAME: pagecoursecolumn
FIELD.COMMENT: Output column holding a course id; when the report is shown in a block on a course page, rows are limited to that page's course. NULL = no page-course filter.
